text: I realize when I say "spacial computing," I actually have, mostly in mind, "tactile computing" with spacial input more important than 3D output.

text:
Nicely designed but doesn't really seem like a new way to play music to me!
Being able to detect two magnets on top of one another is nice, I wonder how reliable that is
